summary: Phase 2 release: mobile-first premium workspace layout, explicit dark/light mode controls, six full visual skins, durable RTL/LTR setting controls, safe-area drawer geometry and transparent live status overlays.
features: Top drawing controls remain reachable on narrow Android screens through a touch-safe horizontal toolbar rather than clipped or miniature controls.
The Settings workspace is a structured mobile bottom sheet and a contained desktop side workspace, with safe-area spacing and scroll-safe final controls.
Dark and Light mode can be selected explicitly in Settings; the top toolbar control remains a fast toggle.
Six complete premium interface skins remain local, reusable and visually distinct: Violet, Pink, Sapphire, Obsidian, Silver and Gold.
RTL/LTR-safe labels, select spacing, toggles, summary arrows and fixed header geometry are preserved without mirroring the AIR-DROW mark.
FPS, network and camera labels remain text-only overlays with no background card, blur or border.

buildPolicy.fallback: npm run model:sync remains recovery-only; production clients use the verified local asset.
buildPolicy.runtimeNetwork: no remote MediaPipe module or model is loaded by the deployed browser
